name: rent2b-mcp
description: rent2b MCP for Vermieter (rental businesses) — bookings, availability, pricing incl. duration discounts, guests, and statistics, with an interactive launcher skill.

interface.longDescription: Manage bookings, availability, pricing (incl. duration discounts / long-stay rebates), guests, items/rooms, and statistics for a rent2b organization directly from chat. Sign in with the rent2b account (email/password or Google/Apple); each user only sees and manages their own organization.
defaultPrompt: Wie ist meine Auslastung diesen Monat?
Leg einen Staffelpreis für Langzeitbuchungen an.
